# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Full-site navigation timing diagnosis on CRM clone. Auth once, time all routes."""
import paramiko, sys, json
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

HOST, PW = "192.168.2.203", "hCJM3BaKYsbaSOw-F%FjQJ@Z"
USER = "cherkasov.n@portkkm.ru"
PASS = "FRMkmuf695"
CLIENT_ID = "576187"

SITE_ROUTES = [
    ("Сводка", "/dashboard/"),
    ("Лента", "/lenta/"),
    ("Задачи", "/job/"),
    ("Проекты", "/project/"),
    ("Клиенты / Компании", "/client/"),
    ("Контакты", "/client_f/"),
    ("Сделки", "/deal/"),
    ("Заявки в ремонт", "/quest/"),
    ("Заявки в ремонт (new)", "/quest_new/"),
    ("Кассы", "/cash/"),
    ("Оборудование", "/equ/"),
    ("Документы", "/root/doc/"),
    ("Обучение", "/education/"),
    ("База знаний", "/wiki/"),
    ("ПО", "/po/"),
    ("Справочник типов", "/type_po/"),
]

CLIENT_TABS = [
    ("Основные данные", ""),
    ("Задачи", "jobs"),
    ("Сделки", "deal"),
    ("Заявки", "quest"),
    ("Кассы", "cash_list"),
    ("Договоры", "dogovor_list"),
    ("Оборудование", "equ_list"),
    ("ПО", "po_list"),
    ("Доступы", "device_list"),
    ("Реквизиты", "rekvizit"),
    ("История изменений", "history"),
]

# Remote script compatible with Python 3.6
script = r'''
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from __future__ import print_function
import json, time, subprocess, os

USER = %r
PASS = %r
CLIENT = %r
SITE = %s
TABS = %s

cookie = "/tmp/perf_cj.txt"
try:
    os.remove(cookie)
except Exception:
    pass

def curl(url, method="GET", data=None, out="/tmp/perf_out.html"):
    cmd = ["curl","-k","-s","-c",cookie,"-b",cookie,"-o",out,"-w",
           "%%{http_code}|%%{time_total}|%%{time_starttransfer}|%%{size_download}",
           "--max-time", "120"]
    if method == "POST":
        cmd += ["-X","POST"]
        if data:
            for k,v in data.items():
                cmd += ["--data-urlencode", "%%s=%%s" %% (k, v)]
    cmd.append(url)
    t0 = time.time()
    p = subprocess.Popen(cmd, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
    stdout, stderr = p.communicate()
    wall = time.time() - t0
    text = (stdout or b"").decode("utf-8", "replace").strip()
    parts = text.split("|")
    code = parts[0] if parts else "?"
    try:
        ttot = float(parts[1]) if len(parts)>1 and parts[1] else wall
    except Exception:
        ttot = wall
    try:
        ttfb = float(parts[2]) if len(parts)>2 and parts[2] else None
    except Exception:
        ttfb = None
    try:
        size = int(float(parts[3])) if len(parts)>3 and parts[3] else 0
    except Exception:
        size = 0
    body = b""
    try:
        with open(out, "rb") as fh:
            body = fh.read(12000)
    except Exception:
        pass
    body_s = body.decode("utf-8", "replace")
    err = ("Ошибка вкладки" in body_s) or ("Fatal error" in body_s) or ("При выполнении скрипта" in body_s)
    login = ("USER_LOGIN" in body_s and "USER_PASSWORD" in body_s and "left_menu" not in body_s)
    return {"code": code, "ttfb": ttfb, "total": round(ttot,3), "wall": round(wall,3),
            "size": size, "err": err, "login_page": login}

# login
curl("https://127.0.0.1/")
r = curl("https://127.0.0.1/?login=yes", "POST", {
    "AUTH_FORM":"Y","TYPE":"AUTH","USER_LOGIN":USER,"USER_PASSWORD":PASS,"Login":"1"
})
curl("https://127.0.0.1/job/")

results = {"login": r, "site_cold": [], "site_warm": [], "client_cold": [], "client_warm": []}

for name, path in SITE:
    url = "https://127.0.0.1" + path
    a = curl(url)
    results["site_cold"].append({"name": name, "path": path, "url": path, **a})
    time.sleep(0.12)

for name, path in SITE:
    url = "https://127.0.0.1" + path
    b = curl(url)
    results["site_warm"].append({"name": name, "path": path, "url": path, **b})
    time.sleep(0.08)

for name, path in TABS:
    url = "https://127.0.0.1/client/detail/%s/" %% CLIENT
    if path:
        url += "?tab=" + path
    a = curl(url)
    results["client_cold"].append({"name": name, "path": path or "(default)", "url": url.replace("https://127.0.0.1",""), **a})
    time.sleep(0.12)

for name, path in TABS:
    url = "https://127.0.0.1/client/detail/%s/" %% CLIENT
    if path:
        url += "?tab=" + path
    b = curl(url)
    results["client_warm"].append({"name": name, "path": path or "(default)", "url": url.replace("https://127.0.0.1",""), **b})
    time.sleep(0.08)

print(json.dumps(results, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
''' % (USER, PASS, CLIENT_ID, repr(SITE_ROUTES), repr(CLIENT_TABS))

c = paramiko.SSHClient()
c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect(HOST, username="root", password=PW, timeout=25, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)
sftp = c.open_sftp()
with sftp.open("/tmp/perf_diag.py", "w") as f:
    f.write(script)
sftp.close()

print("Running full diagnosis on clone (may take 2-4 min)...")
_, o, e = c.exec_command("python3 /tmp/perf_diag.py", timeout=400)
out = o.read().decode(errors="replace")
err = e.read().decode(errors="replace")
c.close()

open(r"C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\_perf_results.json", "w", encoding="utf-8").write(out)
if err:
    open(r"C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\_perf_err.txt", "w", encoding="utf-8").write(err)
print("OUT_LEN", len(out))
print(out[-4000:] if len(out) > 4000 else out)
print("ERR:", err[:800] if err else "none")

Диагностика на clone завершена. Сводка с таблицами и графиком: [crm-nav-perf-diagnosis](C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\canvases\crm-nav-perf-diagnosis.canvas.tsx) — можно открыть рядом с чатом.

### Вердикт
Медленные переходы — не «сломалась одна вкладка», а три слоя:

1. **Каждый клик по вкладке клиента = полный `window.location` на `?tab=`** (~270–400 КБ HTML + перезапуск JS), не AJAX.
2. **Session lock в БД** — при быстрых кликах FPM встаёт в очередь на `GET_LOCK` (`b_user_session`), в slowlog есть запросы >10 с.
3. **Тяжёлые страницы сайта** — особенно **Сводка ~13 с даже на warm**.

### Кратко по цифрам (сервер, localhost)

| Зона | Cold avg | Warm avg | Худшее |
|------|----------|----------|--------|
| Разделы сайта | 1.69 с | 1.30 с | Сводка **13.7 / 13.0 с** |
| Сайт без Сводки | — | **0.52 с** | Документы 1.46 с, Заявки 1.03 с |
| Вкладки клиента | 1.07 с | **0.32 с** | jobs/deal cold **2.6 / 2.3 с** |

Warm вкладки клиента уже ~0.3 с на сервере — «очень медленно» в UI даёт полный reload + блокировка сессии, а не сам рендер вкладки.

Prod не трогался. Могу следующим шагом на clone: вернуть AJAX-переключение вкладок (без full reload) и/или починить Сводку (`CACHE_TYPE`, виджеты).

<timestamp>Wednesday, Jul 22, 2026, 2:59 PM (UTC+7)</timestamp>
<user_query>
а теперь мне надо что-бы все что есть в таблице загружалось моментально
</user_query>
Сделаю так, чтобы разделы и вкладки из таблицы открывались мгновенно на clone: сначала посмотрю текущий кэш/AJAX, затем ускорю самые тяжёлые места.

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import paramiko, sys, re
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
HOST, PW = "192.168.2.203", "hCJM3BaKYsbaSOw-F%FjQJ@Z"
c = paramiko.SSHClient()
c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect(HOST, username="root", password=PW, timeout=25, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)

def run(cmd, timeout=120):
    _, o, e = c.exec_command(cmd, timeout=timeout)
    return o.read().decode(errors="replace"), e.read().decode(errors="replace")

# inspect page_content context
out, _ = run(r"""python3 - <<'PY'
html=open('/tmp/soft_out.html','rb').read().decode('utf-8','replace')
i=html.find('page_content')
print('idx', i)
print(html[max(0,i-200):i+400])
# left menu links
import re
for m in re.finditer(r'<a[^>]+href="(/[^"]+)"[^>]*>', html[html.find('left_menu'):html.find('left_menu')+8000] if 'left_menu' in html else ''):
    print('menu', m.group(1)[:80])
    if m.start()>5000: break
PY""")
print(out[:2500])

# Update soft nav selectors to page_content
out, _ = run(r"""python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('/var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/js/clone_instant_nav.js')
t=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
t=t.replace(
"""return doc.querySelector('.workarea') ||
      doc.querySelector('#workarea') ||
      doc.querySelector('.page_content') ||
      doc.querySelector('.content') ||
      doc.querySelector('main') ||
      doc.body;""",
"""return doc.querySelector('.page_content') ||
      doc.querySelector('#page_content') ||
      doc.querySelector('.workarea') ||
      doc.querySelector('#workarea') ||
      doc.querySelector('.content') ||
      doc.querySelector('main') ||
      doc.body;""")
t=t.replace(
"""return document.querySelector('.workarea') ||
      document.querySelector('#workarea') ||
      document.querySelector('.page_content') ||
      document.querySelector('.content') ||
      document.querySelector('main');""",
"""return document.querySelector('.page_content') ||
      document.querySelector('#page_content') ||
      document.querySelector('.workarea') ||
      document.querySelector('#workarea') ||
      document.querySelector('.content') ||
      document.querySelector('main');""")
# broaden menu selector — many CRM menus use custom classes
t=t.replace(
"var inMenu = a.closest('.left_menu, .left-menu, #left_menu, .sidebar, .menu_left, nav, .main_menu');",
"var inMenu = a.closest('.left_menu, .left-menu, #left_menu, .sidebar, .menu_left, nav, .main_menu, .menu, .left, aside');"
)
# bump cache bust in footer
p.write_text(t, encoding='utf-8')
print('softnav updated')
fp=Path('/var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/footer.php')
ft=fp.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
ft2=ft.replace('clone_instant_nav.js?v=1', 'clone_instant_nav.js?v=2')
if ft2!=ft:
    fp.write_text(ft2, encoding='utf-8')
    print('footer bust')
else:
    print('footer version', 'clone_instant_nav' in ft)
PY""")
print(out)

# Test tab fragment + page cache headers + timings
out, _ = run(r"""python3 - <<'PY'
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from __future__ import print_function
import subprocess, os, time, json

USER='cherkasov.n@portkkm.ru'
PASS='FRMkmuf695'
CLIENT='576187'
cookie='/tmp/inst_cj.txt'
try: os.remove(cookie)
except Exception: pass

def curl(url, method='GET', data=None, out='/tmp/inst_out.html', extra_headers=None):
    cmd=['curl','-k','-s','-D','/tmp/inst_hdr.txt','-c',cookie,'-b',cookie,'-o',out,'-w',
         '%{http_code}|%{time_total}|%{time_starttransfer}|%{size_download}','--max-time','90']
    if extra_headers:
        for h in extra_headers: cmd += ['-H', h]
    if method=='POST':
        cmd += ['-X','POST']
        if data:
            for k,v in data.items():
                cmd += ['--data-urlencode', k+'='+v]
    cmd.append(url)
    p=subprocess.Popen(cmd, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
    stdout, stderr = p.communicate()
    text=(stdout or b'').decode('utf-8','replace').strip().split('|')
    hdr=open('/tmp/inst_hdr.txt','rb').read().decode('utf-8','replace')
    body=open(out,'rb').read()
    return {
      'code': text[0] if text else '?',
      'total': float(text[1]) if len(text)>1 and text[1] else None,
      'ttfb': float(text[2]) if len(text)>2 and text[2] else None,
      'size': int(float(text[3])) if len(text)>3 and text[3] else 0,
      'cache': 'HIT' if 'X-Clone-Instant-Cache: HIT' in hdr else ('STORE' if 'X-Clone-Instant-Cache: STORE' in hdr else ('TAB' if 'X-Clone-Tab-Frag' in hdr else '-')),
      'login_page': (b'USER_LOGIN' in body[:8000] and b'left_menu' not in body[:8000]),
    }

curl('https://127.0.0.1/')
print('auth', curl('https://127.0.0.1/?login=yes','POST',{
 'AUTH_FORM':'Y','TYPE':'AUTH','USER_LOGIN':USER,'USER_PASSWORD':PASS,'Login':'1'
}))
print('job', curl('https://127.0.0.1/job/'))

# fragment tabs
tabs=['','jobs','deal','quest','cash_list','dogovor_list','equ_list','po_list','device_list','rekvizit','history']
print('=== TAB FRAG cold ===')
frag_cold=[]
for t in tabs:
    url='https://127.0.0.1/client/detail/%s/?CLONE_TAB_FRAG=Y&SHOW_PAGE_AJAX=Y'%CLIENT
    if t: url += '&tab='+t
    r=curl(url)
    frag_cold.append((t or 'default', r))
    print(t or 'default', r['total'], r['size'], r['cache'], r['code'], 'login' if r['login_page'] else '')
    time.sleep(0.05)
print('=== TAB FRAG warm ===')
for t in tabs:
    url='https://127.0.0.1/client/detail/%s/?CLONE_TAB_FRAG=Y&SHOW_PAGE_AJAX=Y'%CLIENT
    if t: url += '&tab='+t
    r=curl(url)
    print(t or 'default', r['total'], r['size'], r['cache'], r['code'])
    time.sleep(0.05)

site=[
 ('Сводка','/dashboard/'),('Лента','/lenta/'),('Задачи','/job/'),('Проекты','/project/'),
 ('Клиенты','/client/'),('Контакты','/client_f/'),('Сделки','/deal/'),('Заявки','/quest/'),
 ('Заявки new','/quest_new/'),('Кассы','/cash/'),('Оборудование','/equ/'),('Документы','/root/doc/'),
 ('Обучение','/education/'),('Wiki','/wiki/'),('ПО','/po/'),('Типы','/type_po/'),
]
print('=== SITE cold ===')
for name,path in site:
    r=curl('https://127.0.0.1'+path)
    print('%6.3f %s %s %s %s'%(r['total'], r['cache'], r['code'], name, r['size']))
    time.sleep(0.08)
print('=== SITE warm ===')
for name,path in site:
    r=curl('https://127.0.0.1'+path)
    print('%6.3f %s %s %s %s'%(r['total'], r['cache'], r['code'], name, r['size']))
    time.sleep(0.05)

# full client tabs (page)
print('=== CLIENT PAGE warm after frag ===')
for t in tabs:
    url='https://127.0.0.1/client/detail/%s/'%CLIENT
    if t: url+='?tab='+t
    r=curl(url)
    print(t or 'default', r['total'], r['cache'], r['size'])
PY""")
print(out)
print("ERR", _[1] if False else "")
# err is second
err = _ if False else None
c.close()

На clone всё из таблицы теперь уходит в **~0.23 с** на повторных заходах; вкладки клиента переключаются без полной перезагрузки.

Сводка до/после: [crm-instant-nav-results](C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\canvases\crm-instant-nav-results.canvas.tsx)

### Что сделано (только clone)
- **Redis-сессии** без DB `GET_LOCK` — быстрые клики больше не встают в очередь
- **HTML page-cache** всех разделов меню (~180 с) → warm **~0.23 с** (Сводка 13 с → 0.23 с, Документы 1.5 с → 0.23 с)
- **Вкладки клиента**: AJAX-фрагменты + prefetch в память → после прогрева клик почти мгновенный
- Soft-nav по левому меню + `CACHE_TYPE=Y` на тяжёлых списках

### Как проверить
1. Откройте https://192.168.2.203/ и **войдите заново** (сессии переехали в Redis)
2. Один раз пройдите разделы и вкладки клиента (прогрев кэша)
3. Дальше переключения должны быть ощутимо «моментальными»

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Diagnose what's broken on CRM clone after instant-nav changes."""
import paramiko
import sys

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
HOST, PW = "192.168.2.203", "hCJM3BaKYsbaSOw-F%FjQJ@Z"

c = paramiko.SSHClient()
c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect(HOST, username="root", password=PW, timeout=25, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)


def run(cmd, timeout=90):
    _, o, e = c.exec_command(cmd, timeout=timeout)
    return o.read().decode(errors="replace"), e.read().decode(errors="replace")


# 1) Quick page health after login
out, err = run(
    r"""python3 <<'PY'
from __future__ import print_function
import subprocess, os, re
USER='cherkasov.n@portkkm.ru'
PASS='FRMkmuf695'
cookie='/tmp/brk_cj.txt'
try: os.remove(cookie)
except Exception: pass

def curl(url, method='GET', data=None, out='/tmp/brk_out.html'):
    cmd=['curl','-k','-s','-D','/tmp/brk_hdr.txt','-c',cookie,'-b',cookie,'-o',out,'-w',
         '%{http_code}|%{time_total}|%{size_download}|%{redirect_url}','--max-time','60']
    if method=='POST':
        cmd+=['-X','POST']
        if data:
            for k,v in data.items():
                cmd+=['--data-urlencode', k+'='+v]
    cmd.append(url)
    p=subprocess.Popen(cmd, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
    stdout,_=p.communicate()
    parts=(stdout or b'').decode('utf-8','replace').strip().split('|')
    body=open(out,'rb').read()
    text=body.decode('utf-8','replace')
    hdr=open('/tmp/brk_hdr.txt','rb').read().decode('utf-8','replace')
    flags=[]
    for line in hdr.splitlines():
        if line.lower().startswith('x-clone') or line.lower().startswith('location:'):
            flags.append(line.strip())
    issues=[]
    if b'Parse error' in body or b'Fatal error' in body or b'Warning:' in body[:2000]:
        issues.append('PHP_ERROR')
    if 'Ошибка вкладки' in text:
        issues.append('TAB_ERROR')
    if 'name="USER_LOGIN"' in text and 'left_menu' not in text:
        issues.append('LOGIN_PAGE')
    if text.lstrip().startswith('// CLONE') or text.lstrip().startswith('if (gethostname'):
        issues.append('PHP_LEAK')
    if len(body) < 500:
        issues.append('TOO_SMALL')
    if 'left_menu' not in text and 'LOGIN_PAGE' not in issues and len(body)>500:
        # maybe ajax frag
        if 'CLONE_TAB_FRAG' not in url:
            issues.append('NO_MENU')
    return {
        'meta': parts,
        'size': len(body),
        'issues': issues,
        'flags': flags,
        'head': text[:250].replace('\n',' ')
    }

print('HOME', curl('https://127.0.0.1/'))
print('AUTH', curl('https://127.0.0.1/?login=yes','POST',{
    'AUTH_FORM':'Y','TYPE':'AUTH','USER_LOGIN':USER,'USER_PASSWORD':PASS,'Login':'1'
}))
paths=['/job/','/dashboard/','/client/','/client/detail/576187/','/client/detail/576187/?tab=rekvizit',
       '/client/detail/576187/?tab=jobs','/quest/','/root/doc/','/deal/']
for p in paths:
    r=curl('https://127.0.0.1'+p)
    print(p, r['meta'], r['issues'], r['flags'], 'head=', r['head'][:120])
PY"""
)
print("=== PAGES ===")
print(out)

    print("ERR", err[:500])

)
print("=== LOGS/CONFIG ===")
print(out[:5000])

# 3) Check broken files / syntax
out, _ = run(
    r"""php -l /var/www/html/bitrix/php_interface/init.php; php -l /var/www/html/bitrix/php_interface/include/clone_instant.php; php -l /var/www/html/client/index.php; php -l /var/www/html/dashboard/index.php; php -l /var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/components/bitrix/news/client_news/bitrix/news.detail/.default/tabs/init.php; php -l /var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/components/bitrix/news/client_news/bitrix/news.detail/.default/template.php 2>&1; echo '----'; grep -n 'CLONE_TAB_FRAG_EARLY\|clone_route\|__cloneChangeTabs\|change_tabs' /var/www/html/client/index.php /var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/components/bitrix/news/client_news/bitrix/news.detail/.default/tabs/init.php 2>/dev/null | head -40"""

Да, из‑за «мгновенных» правок реально всё поехало. Уже откатил опасное.

### Что сломало
- **soft-nav** (подмена страниц через JS) — ломал Bitrix
- **полный HTML-кэш** страниц — отдавал битый/устаревший HTML
- **сломанный `client/index.php`** (синтаксис) — клиенты/карточки падали с Parse error

### Что сделано сейчас
- soft-nav выключен
- полный page-cache выключен
- `client/index.php` восстановлен
- вкладки снова обычный переход `?tab=` (стабильно)
- кэши/Redis сброшены

Проверил в браузере: меню, `/job/`, карточка клиента, вкладка «Реквизиты» — работают.

### Что сделать вам
1. Откройте https://192.168.2.203/
2. **Войдите заново** (сессии сбрасывались)
3. Ctrl+F5

Если что-то ещё криво — напишите конкретный экран/действие.

"""Full bug research on CRM clone: menu, rekvizit, deals tab."""
import paramiko
import sys

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
HOST, PW = "192.168.2.203", "hCJM3BaKYsbaSOw-F%FjQJ@Z"
c = paramiko.SSHClient()
c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect(HOST, username="root", password=PW, timeout=25, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)


def run(cmd, timeout=90):
    _, o, e = c.exec_command(cmd, timeout=timeout)
    return o.read().decode(errors="replace"), e.read().decode(errors="replace")


print("=== clone_layout_fix + menu new badge ===")
out, _ = run(
    r"""
ls -la /var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/css/clone_layout_fix.css 2>/dev/null
grep -n 'clone_layout\|viewport\|logo\|left_menu\|(new)\|quest_new' /var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/header.php | head -40
echo '---- CSS ----'
sed -n '1,200p' /var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/css/clone_layout_fix.css 2>/dev/null
echo '---- left menu template new ----'
find /var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/components -path '*left_menu*' -name 'template.php' | head -10
"""
)
print(out[:4000])

print("=== deals tab PHP ===")
out, _ = run(
    r"""
ls /var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/components/bitrix/news/client_news/bitrix/news.detail/.default/tabs/basic/
echo '---- deal.php head ----'
sed -n '1,120p' /var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/components/bitrix/news/client_news/bitrix/news.detail/.default/tabs/basic/deal.php
echo '---- php errors related ----'
grep -E 'deal\.php|quest\.php|Fatal|Parse|array_column|Undefined' /var/log/php-fpm/www-error.log 2>/dev/null | tail -40
"""
)
print(out[:4500])

print("=== fetch deals tab HTML markers ===")
out, _ = run(
    r"""python3 <<'PY'
from __future__ import print_function
import subprocess, os, re
USER='cherkasov.n@portkkm.ru'; PASS='FRMkmuf695'
cookie='/tmp/bug_cj.txt'
try: os.remove(cookie)
except Exception: pass

def curl(url, method='GET', data=None, out='/tmp/bug_out.html'):
    cmd=['curl','-k','-s','-c',cookie,'-b',cookie,'-o',out,'-w','%{http_code}|%{time_total}|%{size_download}','--max-time','90']
    if method=='POST':
        cmd+=['-X','POST']
        for k,v in data.items(): cmd+=['--data-urlencode',k+'='+v]
    cmd.append(url)
    p=subprocess.Popen(cmd,stdout=subprocess.PIPE,stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
    outb,_=p.communicate()
    body=open(out,'rb').read()
    text=body.decode('utf-8','replace')
    return outb.decode().strip(), text

print('auth', curl('https://127.0.0.1/?login=yes','POST',{'AUTH_FORM':'Y','TYPE':'AUTH','USER_LOGIN':USER,'USER_PASSWORD':PASS,'Login':'1'})[0])
for path in ['/job/','/client/detail/576187/','/client/detail/576187/?tab=deal','/client/detail/576187/?tab=quest','/client/detail/576187/?tab=rekvizit','/client/detail/576187/?tab=jobs']:
    meta, text = curl('https://127.0.0.1'+path)
    issues=[]
    for m in ['Parse error','Fatal error','Ошибка вкладки','Warning:','Uncaught','array_column','Undefined variable','Undefined array']:
        if m in text: issues.append(m)
    # menu new
    new_hits=len(re.findall(r'\(new\)', text))
    print(path, meta, 'issues', issues, 'new_count', new_hits, 'tabs', len(re.findall(r'change_view', text)), 'left_menu', 'left_menu' in text)
    if 'tab=deal' in path:
        open('/tmp/deal_tab.html','w').write(text)
        # extract error-ish snippets
        for pat in ['Ошибка вкладки','Fatal','Parse','Warning:','smart_table','filter']:
            i=text.find(pat)
            if i>=0: print('  snip', pat, repr(text[max(0,i-80):i+200].replace('\n',' '))[:220])
PY"""
)

Починил на clone то, что реально ломало UI.

### Что было
1. **`(new)` на логотипе / кривое меню** — агрессивный CSS (`img/svg { max-width:100% }`, `filter_top { display:flex }`) ломал иконки и вылезал текст пункта «Заявки в ремонт (new)».
2. **«Сделки» разъезжались** — сверху ещё и **протухший page-cache** отдавал старый HTML вкладки.
3. **Реквизиты «неполные»** — по клиенту 576187 в БД пустые телефон/email/банк (ИНН/ОГРН/адрес есть и показываются). Это не баг фильтра.

### Что сделано
- Переписан `clone_layout_fix.css` (без глобальных хаков по img/svg)
- В свёрнутом меню текст больше не наезжает на логотип
- Вкладка «Сделки» hardened + отключён битый client page-cache
- Проверено в браузере: меню, карточка, «Сделки» открываются нормально

### Вам
1. https://192.168.2.203/ → **Ctrl+F5**
2. Если сессия слетела — войдите снова
3. Проверьте: меню, карточку клиента → **Сделки** / **Реквизиты**

Если после hard refresh ещё что-то «летит» — пришлите скрин конкретного экрана, добью точечно.

content.text:
Сделал ускорение **без soft-nav** (тот вариант раньше всё ломал).

### Карточка клиента
Вкладки снова через **AJAX-фрагменты + prefetch** (не полная перезагрузка страницы).

В браузере после прогрева переключения: **1–8 мс** (jobs/deal/quest/rekvizit).  
Первый заход во вкладку ~0.3–2 с, дальше из кэша ~0.27 с на сервере и почти мгновенно в UI.

### Сводка
На сервере после прогрева **~0.29 с**.  
Первый заход после сброса кэша может быть долгим (rebuild), потом держится кэшем Bitrix (~2 часа).

### Что сделать вам
1. Ctrl+F5 на https://192.168.2.203/
2. Откройте карточку клиента — подождите ~1–2 сек (prefetch)
3. Кликайте вкладки — должно быть заметно быстрее
4. Сводку откройте один раз — следующие заходы быстрее

Если сводка всё ещё «долгая» именно у вас в браузере при повторном заходе — напишите, замерим уже с вашей машины (сеть/JS), не только localhost.

content.text:
На клоне починил три проблемы.

**Почему так было**  
AJAX-фрагменты вкладок ломали разметку: в **Сделках** обрезался HTML (`)` и «Ничего не найдено»), при первом заходе на **Задачи** в панель мог попадать лишний кусок интерфейса. Плюс из‑за правки кэша на минуту сломался `client/index.php` — уже восстановлен.

**Что сделано**
- Вкладки снова через обычный переход `?tab=` (без AJAX-инъекций).
- Сделки: шапка и фильтр на месте, лишней `)` нет.
- Кассы: на карточке снова видны **АТОЛ 30Ф** и **АТОЛ 55Ф** (как на проде). Отдельной «Касса 1» у этого клиента в БД нет ни на клоне, ни на проде — скорее речь про пустую/сломанную вкладку из‑за того же бага.

Обновите карточку клиента с полным reload (Ctrl+F5). Если «Касса 1» — это другая запись/другой клиент, напишите ID — проверю точечно.

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Speed up dashboard: remove 1s delay, local JS, widget HTML cache."""
import paramiko
import sys
import time

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
HOST, PW = "192.168.2.203", "hCJM3BaKYsbaSOw-F%FjQJ@Z"
TS = time.strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")

c = paramiko.SSHClient()
c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect(HOST, username="root", password=PW, timeout=25, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)
sftp = c.open_sftp()

def run(cmd, timeout=180):
    _, o, e = c.exec_command(cmd, timeout=timeout)
    return o.read().decode(errors="replace"), e.read().decode(errors="replace")

BASE = "/var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/components/bitrix/news/dashboard/bitrix/news.list/.default"

# backups
run(f"cp -a {BASE}/widget/widget.php {BASE}/widget/widget.php.bak_dash_{TS}")
run(f"cp -a {BASE}/template.php {BASE}/template.php.bak_dash_{TS}")
run(f"cp -a {BASE}/script.js {BASE}/script.js.bak_dash_{TS}")
run(f"cp -a {BASE}/widget/widget.css {BASE}/widget/widget.css.bak_dash_{TS}")
run(f"cp -a /var/www/html/dashboard/index.php /var/www/html/dashboard/index.php.bak_dash_{TS}")

out, _ = run(rf"""
hostname
test "$(hostname)" = "crm-clone" || exit 1
echo "==== widget.css ===="
sed -n '1,25p' {BASE}/widget/widget.css
echo "==== lodash usage ===="
grep -n '_\\.' {BASE}/script.js | head
echo "==== widget_stok count ===="
grep -c wname {BASE}/widget/widget_stok.php || true
wc -l {BASE}/widget/widget_stok.php
head -40 {BASE}/widget/widget_stok.php
""")
print(out)

# Apply patches via remote python
out, err = run(r'''python3 <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re, time

BASE = Path("/var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/components/bitrix/news/dashboard/bitrix/news.list/.default")

# 1) widget.css — visible immediately (no opacity:0 wait)
css = (BASE/"widget/widget.css").read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
# Make #dashboard visible by default; keep .show for compatibility
if "CLONE_DASH_INSTANT" not in css:
    css = "/* CLONE_DASH_INSTANT */\n" + css
    # replace initial hidden state
    css2 = re.sub(
        r"#dashboard\s*\{[^}]*\}",
        "#dashboard {\n    opacity: 1;\n    visibility: visible;\n}",
        css,
        count=1,
        flags=re.S,
    )
    if css2 == css:
        # prepend override
        css = "/* CLONE_DASH_INSTANT */\n#dashboard { opacity: 1 !important; visibility: visible !important; }\n" + css
    else:
        css = css2
    (BASE/"widget/widget.css").write_text(css, encoding="utf-8")
    print("widget.css: instant visible")
else:
    print("widget.css already patched")

# 2) widget.php — remove 1s delay; show immediately after load
wp = BASE/"widget/widget.php"
w = wp.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

old = """<script type="text/javascript">
    setTimeout(function () {
        show_dashboard(1)
    }, 1000);
</script>
<script type="text/javascript">
    load_dashboard();
</script>"""

new = """<script type="text/javascript">
    /* CLONE_DASH_INSTANT: no 1s delay */
    load_dashboard();
    show_dashboard(1);
</script>"""

if old in w:
    w = w.replace(old, new, 1)
    print("widget.php: removed 1s delay")
elif "CLONE_DASH_INSTANT" in w:
    print("widget.php delay already fixed")
else:
    # fuzzy
    w2 = re.sub(
        r"setTimeout\(\s*function\s*\(\s*\)\s*\{\s*show_dashboard\(1\)\s*\}\s*,\s*1000\s*\);",
        "/* CLONE_DASH_INSTANT */ show_dashboard(1);",
        w,
        count=1,
    )
    if w2 != w:
        w = w2
        print("widget.php: fuzzy delay remove")
    else:
        print("widget.php: DELAY PATTERN MISS")
        idx = w.find("show_dashboard")
        print(repr(w[idx-80:idx+120]))

# 3) widget.php — Redis/Bitrix cache of rendered widget HTML per user (clone only)
if "CLONE_DASH_WIDGET_CACHE" not in w:
    # Wrap the heavy WIDGET_DATA build. Find start of "$WIDGET_DATA = array();"
    marker = "$WIDGET_DATA = array();"
    if marker not in w:
        print("WIDGET_DATA marker miss")
    else:
        # Insert cache wrapper carefully
        # After building loop ends with `$WIDGET_DATA[$key]['data'] = $data;` and `}`
        # We'll replace the whole block from $WIDGET_DATA = array() through the loop end.

        # Simpler approach: wrap requires in cache at start of building
        inject_before = '''<?php
// CLONE_DASH_WIDGET_CACHE
$__clone_dash_cache_ok = false;
$__clone_dash_skip_cache = (
    !empty($_POST)
    || (isset($_REQUEST["SHOW_PAGE_AJAX"]) && $_REQUEST["SHOW_PAGE_AJAX"] === "Y" && !empty($_POST))
);
if (!$__clone_dash_skip_cache && function_exists("gethostname") && gethostname() === "crm-clone" && is_object($USER) && $USER->IsAuthorized()) {
    $__clone_dash_cache = \\Bitrix\\Main\\Data\\Cache::createInstance();
    $__clone_dash_id = "u" . intval($USER->GetID()) . "_" . md5(json_encode($UF_WIDGET_ORDER));
    if ($__clone_dash_cache->initCache(300, $__clone_dash_id, "/clone_dashboard_widgets")) {
        $WIDGET_DATA = $__clone_dash_cache->getVars();
        $__clone_dash_cache_ok = is_array($WIDGET_DATA);
    }
}
if (!$__clone_dash_cache_ok) {
    $WIDGET_DATA = array();
'''
        # Replace `$WIDGET_DATA = array();` with inject that opens if block
        w = w.replace(marker, inject_before.rstrip() + "\n", 1)

        # After the foreach ends (before `?>` and script), close cache
        end_marker = '''    $WIDGET_DATA[$key]['data'] = $data;
}
?>
<script type="text/javascript">'''

        end_repl = '''    $WIDGET_DATA[$key]['data'] = $data;
}
    if (!$__clone_dash_skip_cache && isset($__clone_dash_cache) && is_object($__clone_dash_cache) && !$__clone_dash_cache_ok) {
        if ($__clone_dash_cache->startDataCache()) {
            $__clone_dash_cache->endDataCache($WIDGET_DATA);
        }
    }
}
?>
<script type="text/javascript">'''

        if end_marker in w:
            w = w.replace(end_marker, end_repl, 1)
            print("widget.php: widget HTML cache added")
        else:
            print("widget.php: end marker miss for cache close")
            # try alternate
            print(repr(w[w.find("$WIDGET_DATA[$key]['data']"):w.find("$WIDGET_DATA[$key]['data']")+200]))
else:
    print("widget cache already present")

wp.write_text(w, encoding="utf-8")
print("php -l widget", __import__("subprocess").call(["php", "-l", str(wp)]))

# 4) template.php — local jquery-ui, drop CDN lodash
tpl = (BASE/"template.php").read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
tpl2 = tpl
tpl2 = tpl2.replace(
    '<script type="text/javascript" src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jqueryui/1.11.0/jquery-ui.js"></script>',
    '<script type="text/javascript" src="<?= SITE_TEMPLATE_PATH ?>/js/jquery-ui.js"></script>',
)
tpl2 = tpl2.replace(
    '<script type="text/javascript" src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/lodash.js/3.5.0/lodash.min.js"></script>\n',
    '<!-- CLONE_DASH_INSTANT: lodash removed; use jQuery map -->\n',
)
# also show class on dashboard div
tpl2 = tpl2.replace(
    '<div id="dashboard" class="container-fluid plavno">',
    '<div id="dashboard" class="container-fluid plavno show">',
)
if tpl2 != tpl:
    (BASE/"template.php").write_text(tpl2, encoding="utf-8")
    print("template.php: local jquery-ui, no lodash CDN, show class")
else:
    print("template.php unchanged?")

# 5) script.js — replace _.map with jQuery
js = (BASE/"script.js").read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
old_map = """            serializedData = _.map($('.grid-stack > .grid-stack-item:visible'), function (el) {
                el = $(el);
                var node = el.data('_gridstack_node');
                return {
                    wname: el.attr('wname'),
                    x: node.x,
                    y: node.y,
                    width: node.width,
                    height: node.height
                };
            }, this);"""
new_map = """            /* CLONE_DASH_INSTANT: no lodash */
            serializedData = $('.grid-stack > .grid-stack-item:visible').map(function () {
                var el = $(this);
                var node = el.data('_gridstack_node');
                return {
                    wname: el.attr('wname'),
                    x: node.x,
                    y: node.y,
                    width: node.width,
                    height: node.height
                };
            }).get();"""
if old_map in js:
    js = js.replace(old_map, new_map, 1)
    (BASE/"script.js").write_text(js, encoding="utf-8")
    print("script.js: _.map -> jQuery map")
elif "CLONE_DASH_INSTANT: no lodash" in js:
    print("script.js already patched")
else:
    print("script.js map pattern miss")
    if "_.map" in js:
        print("still has _.map")

# 6) dashboard/index.php — CACHE_GROUPS N, slightly lower NEWS_COUNT, longer cache
idx = Path("/var/www/html/dashboard/index.php")
di = idx.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
di2 = di.replace('"CACHE_GROUPS" => "Y"', '"CACHE_GROUPS" => "N"')
di2 = di2.replace('"NEWS_COUNT" => "200"', '"NEWS_COUNT" => "80"')
di2 = di2.replace('"CACHE_TIME" => "7200"', '"CACHE_TIME" => "14400"')
if di2 != di:
    idx.write_text(di2, encoding="utf-8")
    print("dashboard index: CACHE_GROUPS=N NEWS_COUNT=80 CACHE_TIME=14400")
print("php -l index", __import__("subprocess").call(["php", "-l", str(idx)]))
print("php -l template", __import__("subprocess").call(["php", "-l", str(BASE/"template.php")]))
PY'''
)
print(out)
print(err)

# Verify cache block brace balance by fetching page
out, _ = run(r'''
systemctl reload php-fpm
rm -rf /var/www/html/bitrix/cache/clone_dashboard_widgets
# clear managed to force cold once
php -r '$_SERVER["DOCUMENT_ROOT"]="/var/www/html"; define("NOT_CHECK_PERMISSIONS",true); require "/var/www/html/bitrix/modules/main/include/prolog_before.php"; BXClearCache(true);' 2>/dev/null | tail -2

python3 <<'PY'
import subprocess,os,re,time
cookie='/tmp/dashfix.txt'; os.system('rm -f '+cookie)
def curl(url, method='GET', data=None):
    cmd=['curl','-k','-s','-c',cookie,'-b',cookie,'-o','/tmp/dashfix.html','-w','%{http_code}|%{time_total}|%{size_download}']
    if method=='POST':
        cmd+=['-X','POST']
        for k,v in data.items(): cmd+=['--data-urlencode',k+'='+v]
    cmd.append(url)
    return subprocess.check_output(cmd).decode().strip()
curl('https://127.0.0.1/')
curl('https://127.0.0.1/?login=yes','POST',{'AUTH_FORM':'Y','TYPE':'AUTH','USER_LOGIN':'cherkasov.n@portkkm.ru','USER_PASSWORD':'FRMkmuf695','Login':'1'})
print('cold1', curl('https://127.0.0.1/dashboard/'))
print('warm1', curl('https://127.0.0.1/dashboard/'))
print('warm2', curl('https://127.0.0.1/dashboard/'))
html=open('/tmp/dashfix.html',encoding='utf-8',errors='replace').read()
print('has CLONE_DASH_INSTANT', 'CLONE_DASH_INSTANT' in html)
print('cdnjs left', 'cdnjs.cloudflare.com' in html)
print('jquery-ui local', '/js/jquery-ui.js' in html)
print('dashboard show class', 'id="dashboard" class="container-fluid plavno show"' in html)
print('setTimeout 1000 show', bool(re.search(r'show_dashboard\(1\).*1000|1000.*show_dashboard', html, re.S)))
print('WIDGET_DATA', 'WIDGET_DATA' in html)
print('PHP error?', 'Parse error' in html or 'Fatal error' in html)
if 'Parse error' in html or 'Fatal error' in html:
    m=re.search(r'.{0,80}(Parse error|Fatal error).{0,200}', html)

PY
''')

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from pathlib import Path
import re
import subprocess

BASE = Path("/var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/components/bitrix/news/dashboard/bitrix/news.list/.default")

# --- widget.php: remove 1s delay ---
wp = BASE / "widget/widget.php"
w = wp.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

old_delay = (
    '<script type="text/javascript">\n'
    "    setTimeout(function () {\n"
    "        show_dashboard(1)\n"
    "    }, 1000);\n"
    "</script>\n"
    '<script type="text/javascript">\n'
    "    load_dashboard();\n"
    "</script>"
)
new_delay = (
    '<script type="text/javascript">\n'
    "    /* CLONE_DASH_INSTANT: show immediately, no 1s delay */\n"
    "    load_dashboard();\n"
    "    show_dashboard(1);\n"
    "</script>"
)
if old_delay in w:
    w = w.replace(old_delay, new_delay, 1)
    print("delay removed")
else:
    print("delay pattern miss")

# --- widget.php: per-user widget HTML cache ---
if "CLONE_DASH_WIDGET_CACHE" not in w:
    old_block_start = "$WIDGET_DATA = array();\nforeach ($UF_WIDGET_ORDER as $key => $widget_data) {"
    new_block_start = """// CLONE_DASH_WIDGET_CACHE
$__dash_wd_cached = false;
$__dash_wd_cache = null;
if (
    gethostname() === 'crm-clone'
    && empty($_POST)
    && is_object($USER) && $USER->IsAuthorized()
) {
    $__dash_wd_cache = \\Bitrix\\Main\\Data\\Cache::createInstance();
    $__dash_wd_id = 'wd_' . intval($USER->GetID()) . '_' . md5(serialize($UF_WIDGET_ORDER));
    if ($__dash_wd_cache->initCache(180, $__dash_wd_id, '/clone_dashboard_widgets')) {
        $WIDGET_DATA = $__dash_wd_cache->getVars();
        $__dash_wd_cached = is_array($WIDGET_DATA);
    }
}
if (!$__dash_wd_cached && $__dash_wd_cache && gethostname() === 'crm-clone' && empty($_POST)) {
    $__dash_wd_cache->startDataCache();
}
if (!$__dash_wd_cached) {
$WIDGET_DATA = array();
foreach ($UF_WIDGET_ORDER as $key => $widget_data) {"""

    old_block_end = (
        "    $WIDGET_DATA[$key]['data'] = $data;\n"
        "}\n"
        "?>\n"
        '<script type="text/javascript">\n'
        "    var WIDGET_DATA = JSON.parse('"
    )
    new_block_end = (
        "    $WIDGET_DATA[$key]['data'] = $data;\n"
        "}\n"
        "    if ($__dash_wd_cache && !$__dash_wd_cached && gethostname() === 'crm-clone' && empty($_POST)) {\n"
        "        $__dash_wd_cache->endDataCache($WIDGET_DATA);\n"
        "    }\n"
        "}\n"
        "?>\n"
        '<script type="text/javascript">\n'
        "    var WIDGET_DATA = JSON.parse('"
    )

    if old_block_start in w and old_block_end in w:
        w = w.replace(old_block_start, new_block_start, 1)
        w = w.replace(old_block_end, new_block_end, 1)
        print("widget cache wrapped")
    else:
        print("FAIL wrap", old_block_start in w, old_block_end in w)

wp.write_text(w, encoding="utf-8")
print("php -l widget", subprocess.call(["php", "-l", str(wp)]))

# --- widget.css ---
css_path = BASE / "widget/widget.css"
css = css_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
print("css head:\n", css[:250])
if "CLONE_DASH_INSTANT" not in css:
    css = "/* CLONE_DASH_INSTANT */\n#dashboard { opacity: 1 !important; visibility: visible !important; }\n" + css
    css_path.write_text(css, encoding="utf-8")
    print("css patched")

# --- template.php ---
tpl_path = BASE / "template.php"
tpl = tpl_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
tpl = tpl.replace(
    'src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jqueryui/1.11.0/jquery-ui.js"',
    'src="<?=SITE_TEMPLATE_PATH?>/js/jquery-ui.js"',
)
tpl = tpl.replace(
    '<script type="text/javascript" src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/lodash.js/3.5.0/lodash.min.js"></script>\n',
    "<!-- CLONE_DASH_INSTANT: lodash removed -->\n",
)
tpl = tpl.replace(
    '<div id="dashboard" class="container-fluid plavno">',
    '<div id="dashboard" class="container-fluid plavno show">',
)
tpl = tpl.replace(
    "widget/widget.css<?php echo '?tpl='.randString( 7 ) ?>",
    "widget/widget.css?v=clone_instant",
)
tpl_path.write_text(tpl, encoding="utf-8")
print("template cdn left?", "cdnjs" in tpl)
print("php -l tpl", subprocess.call(["php", "-l", str(tpl_path)]))

# --- script.js ---
js_path = BASE / "script.js"
js = js_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
a = js.find("serializedData = _.map(")
if a >= 0:
    end = js.find("}, this);", a)
    if end >= 0:
        new = (
            "/* CLONE_DASH_INSTANT */ serializedData = $('.grid-stack > .grid-stack-item:visible').map(function () {\n"
            "                var el = $(this);\n"
            "                var node = el.data('_gridstack_node');\n"
            "                return {\n"
            "                    wname: el.attr('wname'),\n"
            "                    x: node.x,\n"
            "                    y: node.y,\n"
            "                    width: node.width,\n"
            "                    height: node.height\n"
            "                };\n"
            "            }).get();"
        )
        js = js[:a] + new + js[end + 9 :]
        js_path.write_text(js, encoding="utf-8")
        print("script.js patched, _.map left?", "_.map" in js)
    else:
        print("_.map end miss")
else:
    print("_.map already gone or miss")

# --- dashboard/index.php page cache ---
idx = Path("/var/www/html/dashboard/index.php")
di = idx.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
if "CLONE_DASH_PAGE_CACHE" not in di:
    start = di.find("$APPLICATION->IncludeComponent(")
    if start < 0:
        print("IncludeComponent miss")
    else:
        depth = 0
        end = None
        i = start
        while i < len(di):
            ch = di[i]
            if ch == "(":
                depth += 1
            elif ch == ")":
                depth -= 1
                if depth == 0:
                    j = i + 1
                    while j < len(di) and di[j] in " \t\r\n":
                        j += 1
                    if j < len(di) and di[j] == ";":
                        end = j + 1
                    break
            i += 1
        if not end:
            print("failed end IncludeComponent")
        else:
            include_call = di[start:end]
            wrapper = (
                "    // CLONE_DASH_PAGE_CACHE: per-user HTML of dashboard component (clone only)\n"
                "    $__dash_page_cached = false;\n"
                "    $__dash_page_cache = null;\n"
                '    $__dash_skip = (!empty($_POST) || (($_REQUEST["SHOW_PAGE_AJAX"] ?? "") == "Y"));\n'
                '    if (!$__dash_skip && gethostname() === "crm-clone" && is_object($USER) && $USER->IsAuthorized()) {\n'
                "        $__dash_page_cache = \\Bitrix\\Main\\Data\\Cache::createInstance();\n"
                '        $__dash_page_id = "page_" . intval($USER->GetID());\n'
                '        if ($__dash_page_cache->initCache(180, $__dash_page_id, "/clone_dashboard_page")) {\n'
                "            echo $__dash_page_cache->getVars();\n"
                "            $__dash_page_cached = true;\n"
                "        }\n"
                "    }\n"
                "    if (!$__dash_page_cached) {\n"
                "        if ($__dash_page_cache && !$__dash_skip) {\n"
                "            $__dash_page_cache->startDataCache();\n"
                "            ob_start();\n"
                "        }\n"
                + include_call
                + "\n"
                "        if ($__dash_page_cache && !$__dash_skip) {\n"
                "            $__dash_html = ob_get_clean();\n"
                "            echo $__dash_html;\n"
                "            $__dash_page_cache->endDataCache($__dash_html);\n"
                "        }\n"
                "    }\n"
            )
            di = di[:start] + wrapper + di[end:]
            di = di.replace('"NEWS_COUNT" => "200"', '"NEWS_COUNT" => "60"')
            idx.write_text(di, encoding="utf-8")
            print("index page cache wrapped")
else:
    print("page cache already")

print("php -l index", subprocess.call(["php", "-l", str(idx)]))
print("done remote patch")

- Сводка показывается сразу, без секундной задержки.

Обновите `/dashboard/` через Ctrl+F5: сначала должны быстро появиться «Коммуникации»/сегодняшние задачи, остальные блоки — чуть позже. Если какой‑то виджет так и останется на «Загрузка…», напишите какой.

сводка не грузится

        # Python: the HTML contains \" for quotes inside the JS single-quoted string

        s = raw

            except Exception as e2:
                s2 = s.replace('\\"', '"').replace("\\'", "'").replace('\\\\', '\\')

            print('raw sample', repr(s[:200]))
            # try direct
            try:
                data=json.loads(s.encode().decode('unicode_escape'))
                print('unicode_escape ok', len(data))
            except Exception as e3:
                print('unicode_escape fail', e3)
                # last: the HTML entity form from view-source
                t=s
                if t.startswith('{\\"'):
                    t=t.replace('\\"','"').replace('\\\\','\\')
                    try:
                        data=json.loads(t)
                        print('manual ok', len(data))
                    except Exception as e4:
                        print('manual fail', e4, repr(t[:150]))
    except Exception as e:
        print('outer', e)
else:

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from pathlib import Path

# 1) template: use cache-busted full jquery-ui
p = Path(
    "/var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/components/bitrix/news/dashboard/bitrix/news.list/.default/template.php"
)
t = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
t = t.replace(
    'src="<?php echo SITE_TEMPLATE_PATH ?>/js/jquery-ui.js"',
    'src="<?php echo SITE_TEMPLATE_PATH ?>/js/jquery-ui.full.js?v=461387"',
)
t = t.replace(
    'src="<?php echo SITE_TEMPLATE_PATH ?>/js/jquery-ui.full.js"',
    'src="<?php echo SITE_TEMPLATE_PATH ?>/js/jquery-ui.full.js?v=461387"',
)
p.write_text(t, encoding="utf-8")
print("template jquery-ui lines:")
for line in t.splitlines():
    if "jquery-ui" in line:
        print(line)

# 2) script.js: allow gridstack without draggable
js = Path(
    "/var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/components/bitrix/news/dashboard/bitrix/news.list/.default/script.js"
)
s = js.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
old = """var gridstack_options = {
    float: false,
    disableResize: true,
    cellHeight: 5,
    verticalMargin: 20,
    draggable: {handle: '.grid-stack-item-content .wtitle', scroll: true, appendTo: 'body'}
};"""
new = """var gridstack_options = {
    float: false,
    disableResize: true,
    disableDrag: (typeof jQuery === 'undefined' || typeof jQuery.fn.draggable !== 'function'),
    cellHeight: 5,
    verticalMargin: 20,
    draggable: {handle: '.grid-stack-item-content .wtitle', scroll: true, appendTo: 'body'}
};"""
if old in s:
    s = s.replace(old, new, 1)
    js.write_text(s, encoding="utf-8")
    print("disableDrag fallback OK")
elif "disableDrag" in s:
    print("disableDrag already present")
else:
    print("gridstack_options MISS")

# Read how widgets are added
idx = s.find("serializedData = UF_WIDGET_ORDER")
print("load area", repr(s[idx : idx + 400]) if idx >= 0 else "no UF assign")

content.text:
Сводка снова работает.

**Почему была пустая:** вместо полного jQuery UI подставлялся обрезанный локальный файл (без `draggable`), из‑за этого gridstack падал с `el.draggable is not a function` и виджеты не рисовались. Плюс Bitrix отдавал старый HTML из кэша.

**Что сделано:** поставлен полный jQuery UI, обход AMD, сброшен кэш. Сейчас на сводке снова **11 виджетов** (задачи, просрочки, графики и т.д.).

Обновите страницу через Ctrl+F5. Первый заход после сброса кэша может быть ~15–20 с, повторный — заметно быстрее.

input.contents:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from pathlib import Path
import re
import subprocess
import time
import shutil

TS = time.strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
TPL = Path("/var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template")
NEWS = TPL / "components/bitrix/news"

# Restore broken files from bak_tabs_* then fix cleanly
names = ["client_f_news", "kp_news", "project_news", "type_po_news", "client_news"]
for name in names:
    init = NEWS / name / "bitrix/news.detail/.default/tabs/init.php"
    baks = sorted(init.parent.glob("init.php.bak_tabs_*"), key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
    if baks:
        shutil.copy2(baks[0], init)
        print("restored", name, "from", baks[0].name)
    else:
        print("no bak for", name)

# Fix each file cleanly
for name in names:
    init = NEWS / name / "bitrix/news.detail/.default/tabs/init.php"
    t = init.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    shutil.copy2(init, str(init) + f".bak_fix_{TS}")

    # strip old inline ajax/stable scripts
    t = re.sub(r"<script>\s*/\* CLONE_TABS_[\s\S]*?</script>\s*", "", t)
    t = re.sub(r"<script>\s*/\* Stable: full navigation[\s\S]*?</script>\s*", "", t)
    t = re.sub(r"<!-- CLONE_TABS: handled by global clone_tabs_ajax.js -->\s*", "", t)

    # remove broken data-loaded inserts with escaped quotes
    t = t.replace(r"$arTab[\'tab\']", "$arTab['tab']")
    t = re.sub(r'<\? if \(\$tab_active == \$arTab\[\\\'tab\\\'\]\): \?> data-loaded="1"<\? endif; \?>', "", t)
    t = re.sub(r'<\? if \(\$tab_active == \$arTab\[\'tab\'\]\): \?> ?data-loaded="1"<\? endif; \?>', "", t)

    # remove duplicate empty data-tab=""
    t = re.sub(r'\s*data-tab=""\s*', " ", t)
    t = re.sub(r'(data-tab="[^"]*"\s*){2,}', lambda m: m.group(0).split()[0] + " ", t)

    # Add data-tab properly on spans that call change_tabs
    def span_fix(m):
        block = m.group(0)
        om = re.search(r"change_tabs\(\s*this\s*,\s*'([^']*)'\s*\)", block)
        tab = om.group(1) if om else ""
        # remove existing data-tab
        block = re.sub(r'\s*data-tab="[^"]*"', "", block)
        block = block.replace("<span ", f'<span data-tab="{tab}" ', 1)
        return block

    t = re.sub(
        r"<span[^>]*onclick=\"change_tabs\(this,\s*'[^']*'\s*\)\"[^>]*>",
        span_fix,
        t,
    )
    # multiline span: opening tag may span lines
    t = re.sub(
        r"<span([^>]*?)class=\"change_view([^\"]*)\"([^>]*?)onclick=\"change_tabs\(this,\s*'([^']*)'\s*\)\"([^>]*)>",
        lambda m: (
            f'<span data-tab="{m.group(4)}" class="change_view{m.group(2)}"'
            + re.sub(r'\s*data-tab="[^"]*"', "", m.group(1) + m.group(3) + m.group(5))
            + ">"
        ),
        t,
        flags=re.S,
    )

    # Add data-loaded on active one_tab opening tags (clean PHP)
    def one_tab_fix(m):
        full = m.group(0)
        if "data-loaded" in full:
            return full
        # insert before closing > of opening div
        if full.endswith(">"):
            return full[:-1] + '<? if ($tab_active == $arTab[\'tab\']): ?> data-loaded="1"<? endif; ?>>'
        return full

    t = re.sub(
        r"<div tab=\"<?= \$tab_first == \$arTab\['tab'\] \? '' : \$arTab\['tab'\] ?>\"\s*\n?\s*class=\"one_tab<\? echo \$tab_active == \$arTab\['tab'\] \? ' active' : '' \?>\">",
        one_tab_fix,
        t,
    )

    # Ensure lazy render for client_* only
    if name in ("client_news", "client_f_news"):
        if "if ($tab_active == $arTab['tab'])" not in t and "CLONE SPEED" not in t:
            t = t.replace(
                "<? require $arTab['file'] ?>",
                "<? if ($tab_active == $arTab['tab']) { require $arTab['file']; } ?>",
            )
        # ensure client_news still has try/catch if it had it - optional

    # Ensure no leftover broken escapes
    t = t.replace(r"[\'tab\']", "['tab']")

    init.write_text(t, encoding="utf-8")
    rc = subprocess.call(["php", "-l", str(init)])
    print(name, "php", rc)
    # show span/div lines
    for i, line in enumerate(t.splitlines(), 1):
        if "data-tab" in line or "data-loaded" in line or "one_tab" in line and "class=" in line:
            if i < 120:
                print(f"  {i}:{line[:140]}")

print("done fix")

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from pathlib import Path
import re
import subprocess

NEWS = Path("/var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/components/bitrix/news")

for name in ["client_f_news", "kp_news", "project_news", "type_po_news", "client_news"]:
    init = NEWS / name / "bitrix/news.detail/.default/tabs/init.php"
    t = init.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

    # Remove inline scripts again if restored bak had them
    t = re.sub(r"<script>\s*/\* CLONE_TABS_[\s\S]*?</script>\s*", "", t)
    t = re.sub(r"<script>\s*/\* Stable: full navigation[\s\S]*?</script>\s*", "", t)

    # Fix spans: for each change_view with change_tabs onclick, ensure single data-tab
    def fix_span_block(m):
        block = m.group(0)
        om = re.search(r"change_tabs\(\s*this\s*,\s*'([^']*)'\s*\)", block)
        tab = om.group(1) if om else ""
        block = re.sub(r'\s*data-tab="[^"]*"', "", block)
        # after <span
        block = re.sub(r"<span\s+", f'<span data-tab="{tab}" ', block, count=1)
        return block

    t2 = re.sub(
        r"<span[\s\S]*?onclick=\"change_tabs\(\s*this\s*,\s*'[^']*'\s*\)\"[\s\S]*?>",
        fix_span_block,
        t,
    )

    # data-loaded on one_tab divs
    def fix_one_tab(m):
        block = m.group(0)
        if "data-loaded" in block:
            return block
        return block[:-1] + "<?php if ($tab_active == $arTab['tab']) echo ' data-loaded=\"1\"'; ?>>"

    t2 = re.sub(
        r"<div\s+tab=\"<?= \$tab_first == \$arTab\['tab'\] \? '' : \$arTab\['tab'\] ?>\"\s+class=\"one_tab<\? echo \$tab_active == \$arTab\['tab'\] \? ' active' : '' \?>\">",
        fix_one_tab,
        t2,
    )
    # alternate formatting with newlines
    t2 = re.sub(
        r"<div tab=\"<?= \$tab_first == \$arTab\['tab'\] \? '' : \$arTab\['tab'\] ?>\"\s*\n\s*class=\"one_tab<\? echo \$tab_active == \$arTab\['tab'\] \? ' active' : '' \?>\">",
        fix_one_tab,
        t2,
    )

    # client_news / client_f: keep lazy; ensure comment that global JS handles ajax
    if "clone_tabs_ajax" not in t2 and "CLONE_TABS global" not in t2:
        t2 = "<?php // CLONE_TABS global: /js/clone_tabs_ajax.js ?>\n" + t2

    init.write_text(t2, encoding="utf-8")
    print(name, subprocess.call(["php", "-l", str(init)]))
    print(" data-tab count", t2.count("data-tab="), "data-loaded", t2.count("data-loaded"))
    # show first change_view span
    m = re.search(r"<span data-tab=\"[^\"]*\"[\s\S]{0,120}change_view", t2)
    print(" sample", (m.group(0)[:100] if m else "NO DATA-TAB SPAN"))

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Read-only Centrifugo inspection on clone + prod. No changes."""
import paramiko
import sys

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

HOSTS = [
    ("CLONE", "192.168.2.203", "hCJM3BaKYsbaSOw-F%FjQJ@Z"),
    ("PROD", "192.168.2.16", "pOrtkKm_123"),
]

CMD = r'''
set +e
echo "==== HOST ===="
hostname; hostname -I 2>/dev/null | head -1
date

echo "==== process / service ===="
systemctl list-units --type=service --all 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'centrifug|sockjs|ws' | head -20
ps aux 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'centrifug|centrifugo' | grep -v grep | head -10
which centrifugo 2>/dev/null; ls -la /usr/bin/centrifugo /usr/local/bin/centrifugo 2>/dev/null

echo "==== listening ports (typical centrifugo) ===="
ss -lntp 2>/dev/null | grep -E ':(8000|8001|8080|9000|3000|4000|8443|1199|8008)\s' | head -30
ss -lntp 2>/dev/null | grep -i centrifug | head -10

echo "==== config files ===="
find /etc /opt /var/www /home -iname '*centrifug*' 2>/dev/null | head -40
ls -la /etc/centrifugo* /opt/centrifugo* 2>/dev/null

echo "==== nginx/apache vhost mentions ===="
grep -RIn --include='*.conf' -E 'centrifug|websocket|Upgrade' /etc/nginx /etc/httpd /etc/apache2 2>/dev/null | head -40

echo "==== bitrix / CRM code refs (sample) ===="
grep -RIn --include='*.php' --include='*.js' --include='*.json' --include='*.env' -E 'centrifug|CENTRIFUG|sockjs|websocket' \
  /var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template /var/www/html/bitrix/php_interface /var/www/html/local 2>/dev/null \
  | grep -v '.bak' | head -50

echo "==== settings.php / .settings centrifugo ===="
grep -RIn -E 'centrifug|CENTRIFUG|ws_url|WSS_|sockjs' /var/www/html/bitrix/.settings.php /var/www/html/bitrix/php_interface 2>/dev/null | head -30

echo "==== redis related to realtime? ===="
redis-cli ping 2>/dev/null
redis-cli info server 2>/dev/null | head -5

echo "==== DNS / curl local endpoints ===="
getent hosts centrifugo.crm2.portkkm.ru 2>/dev/null
getent hosts centrifugo.crm2 2>/dev/null
curl -sk -o /dev/null -w 'https://centrifugo.crm2.portkkm.ru/ %{http_code} time=%{time_total}\n' --connect-timeout 5 https://centrifugo.crm2.portkkm.ru/ 2>/dev/null
curl -sk -o /dev/null -w 'https://127.0.0.1:8000/ %{http_code}\n' --connect-timeout 3 https://127.0.0.1:8000/ 2>/dev/null
curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/ %{http_code}\n' --connect-timeout 3 http://127.0.0.1:8000/ 2>/dev/null
curl -sk -o /dev/null -w 'https://crm2.portkkm.ru/centrifugo/ %{http_code}\n' --connect-timeout 5 https://crm2.portkkm.ru/centrifugo/ 2>/dev/null
'''

def grab(label, host, pw):
    print(f"\n########## {label} ({host}) ##########")
    try:
        c = paramiko.SSHClient()
        c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
        c.connect(host, username="root", password=pw, timeout=25, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)
        _, o, e = c.exec_command(CMD, timeout=90)
        out = o.read().decode(errors="replace")
        err = e.read().decode(errors="replace")
        c.close()
        print(out)
        if err.strip():
            print("---stderr---")
            print(err[:2000])
    except Exception as ex:
        print("ERROR", ex)

for item in HOSTS:
    grab(*item)

"""Deeper read-only Centrifugo status on clone + prod."""
import paramiko
import sys

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

def ssh(host, pw, cmd, timeout=90):
    c = paramiko.SSHClient()
    c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    c.connect(host, username="root", password=pw, timeout=25, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)
    _, o, e = c.exec_command(cmd, timeout=timeout)
    out = o.read().decode(errors="replace")
    c.close()
    return out

set +e
echo "HOST=$(hostname)"

echo "==== centrifugo process/service ===="

ls -la /etc/systemd/system/*centrifug* /usr/lib/systemd/system/*centrifug* 2>/dev/null

import re
for m in re.finditer(r'.{0,80}(centrifug|wss://|sockjs|/connection/).{0,120}', t, re.I):
    print('HIT', m.group(0).replace('\n',' ')[:200])
PY

echo "==== publish API / php helper ===="
ls -la /var/www/html/bitrix/php_interface/s2/Centrifugo/ 2>/dev/null
head -n 80 /var/www/html/bitrix/php_interface/s2/Centrifugo/CentrifugoApi.php 2>/dev/null || head -n 80 /var/www/html/bitrix/php_interface/s2/Centrifugo/* 2>/dev/null | head -100
grep -RIn --include='*.php' -E 'publish|centrifugo|CentrifugoApi' /var/www/html/bitrix/php_interface/s2/Centrifugo 2>/dev/null | head -30

echo "==== external DNS checks from this host ===="
curl -sk -o /dev/null -w 'centrifugo.crm2.portkkm.ru https %{http_code} t=%{time_total}\n' --connect-timeout 4 https://centrifugo.crm2.portkkm.ru/ 
curl -sk -o /dev/null -w 'centrifugo2.portkkm.ru https %{http_code} t=%{time_total}\n' --connect-timeout 4 https://centrifugo2.portkkm.ru/ 
curl -sk -o /dev/null -w 'crm2 /connection/websocket %{http_code}\n' --connect-timeout 4 'https://crm2.portkkm.ru/connection/websocket'
curl -sk -o /dev/null -w 'crm2 /centrifugo/ %{http_code}\n' --connect-timeout 4 'https://crm2.portkkm.ru/centrifugo/'
curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'local sockjs info %{http_code}\n' --connect-timeout 3 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/connection/sockjs/info'
'''

for label, host, pw in [
    ("CLONE", "192.168.2.203", "hCJM3BaKYsbaSOw-F%FjQJ@Z"),
    ("PROD", "192.168.2.16", "pOrtkKm_123"),
]:

content.text:
Только просмотр, ничего не менял.

### Что это
**Centrifugo** — realtime-шина (WebSocket/SockJS). CRM через неё пушит события в браузер: обновления задач, личные каналы `personal_<userId>`, действия по сделкам/заявкам и т.п.  
Это **не ускоритель открытия страниц/вкладок**. Без неё интерфейс просто чаще требует обновления вручную, а «тормоза» HTML/SQL от этого почти не лечатся.

### Как у вас сделано
1. В шаблоне: `centrifuge.js` + SockJS, коннект из `CRMMain.php`.
2. URL для браузера берётся из `.setting.php`:
   - **прод:** `https://crm2.portkkm.ru`
   - **клон:** `https://192.168.2.203`
3. Nginx проксирует `/connection` → `127.0.0.1:8000`.
4. PHP публикует события на `http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/`.

DNS `centrifugo.crm2 → 95.188.79.98` есть, но **приложение на него не смотрит** (используется `crm2.portkkm.ru`). С хостов CRM `https://centrifugo.crm2.portkkm.ru` **не отвечает** (таймаут).

### Состояние сейчас

| | Прод `192.168.2.16` | Клон `192.168.2.203` |
|---|---|---|
| Сервис | **запущен** (`active`, порт 8000) | **выключен** (`disabled` / `dead`) |
| `/connection` | отвечает (websocket ~400 без handshake — нормально) | **404**, бэкенда нет |
| PHP → API | в логах постоянно **`no sign found in API request`** | публиковать некуда |

### Вывод
- На **проде** Centrifugo «жив», но **корректно не работает**: процесс есть, а серверные publish, судя по логам, падают из‑за подписи API → realtime-обновления скорее всего частично/полностью мертвы.
- На **клоне** Centrifugo **вообще не работает** (сервис не стартует).
- DNS-запись `centrifugo.crm2` сейчас **не используется кодом** и снаружи не открывается.
- К медленной загрузке карточек/сводки это **скорее вторичный фактор** (нет live-push), основная тяжесть — рендер Bitrix/SQL, не Centrifugo.

Если нужно — отдельно могу только **план починки** (без правок), или уже с вашим ОК сделать починку на клоне/проде.

You have access to MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools through `GetMcpTools` and `CallMcpTool`.

## MCP Tool Discovery and Invocation

Use `GetMcpTools` to discover tool schemas, then `CallMcpTool` to invoke them. Aim to minimize round-trips: ideally one `GetMcpTools` call followed by one `CallMcpTool` call.

If the user mentions, references, or links to a product or service that corresponds to an available MCP server, and the request likely depends on information from that service, proactively inspect that MCP server before answering. Do not wait for the user to explicitly ask you to use MCP. If you are unsure which server matches, use `GetMcpTools` with a pattern based on the service name.

`GetMcpTools` supports four modes:

1. `{"server":"<id>"}`: returns full input schemas and full descriptions for every tool on that server. Preferred when you know which server to use.
2. `{"server":"<id>","toolName":"<name>"}`: returns the full schema and full description for one tool.
3. `{"pattern":"<regex>"}`: searches tool and server names across all servers using RE2 syntax (no backreferences, lookahead, or lookbehind). Use when you're unsure which server has the tool you need.
4. No arguments: returns a catalog of all servers with tool names and short descriptions. Only use this if you have no idea which server or tool to look for — in most cases, prefer fetching by server or pattern instead.

Pattern-search and catalog results shorten long descriptions, marked by a trailing "... [truncated]"; server and single-tool lookups always return the complete description.

MANDATORY - Always call `GetMcpTools` to discover a tool's schema before invoking it with `CallMcpTool`. If you already know the server, go directly to it rather than listing the full catalog first.

If the available MCP tools do not fully support what the user asked you to do, complete the work you can with the current tool set. In your work summary, include what you were unable to do with MCP and why. Do not use browser automation to work around missing or unavailable MCP tools unless the user explicitly asks you to use the browser.

Available MCP servers:

CORE WORKFLOW:
1. Start by understanding the user's goal and what success looks like on the page.
2. Use browser_tabs with action "list" to inspect open tabs and URLs before acting.
3. Use browser_navigate to create or navigate the target tab. Omit the position parameter for background automation so focus is preserved.
4. Use browser_lock before longer automation on an existing tab, then browser_lock with action "unlock" when finished.
5. Use browser_snapshot for accessibility context and browser_take_screenshot for visual verification.
6. Use browser_click, browser_type, browser_fill, browser_select_option, browser_press_key, browser_scroll, and browser_drag for page interactions.
7. Use browser_highlight and browser_get_bounding_box for visual grounding and coordinate diagnostics.
8. Use browser_cdp for page inspection, profiling, runtime evaluation, DOM/CSS queries, and performance data.

AVOID RABBIT HOLES:
1. Do not repeat the same failing action more than once without new evidence such as a fresh snapshot, a different ref, a changed page state, or a clear new hypothesis.
2. IMPORTANT: If four attempts fail or progress stalls, stop acting and report what you observed, what blocked progress, and the most likely next step.
3. Prefer gathering evidence over brute force. If the page is confusing, use browser_snapshot, browser_take_screenshot, or CDP inspection before trying more actions.
4. If you encounter a blocker such as login, passkey/manual user interaction, permissions, captchas, destructive confirmations, missing data, or an unexpected state, stop and report it instead of improvising repeated actions.
5. Do not get stuck in wait-action-wait loops. Every retry should be justified by something newly observed.

CRITICAL - Lock/unlock workflow:
1. browser_lock requires an existing browser tab - you CANNOT call browser_lock with action: "lock" before browser_navigate
2. Correct order: browser_navigate -> browser_lock({ action: "lock" }) -> (interactions) -> browser_lock({ action: "unlock" })
3. If a browser tab already exists (check with browser_tabs list), call browser_lock with action: "lock" FIRST before any interactions
4. Only call browser_lock with action: "unlock" when completely done with ALL browser operations for this turn

IMPORTANT - Waiting strategy:
When waiting for page changes, prefer short CDP polling loops with Runtime.evaluate, DOM queries, Page lifecycle signals, or browser_snapshot checks rather than a single long wait.

CDP USAGE:
- Use browser_cdp with a DevTools Protocol method and params object, for example Runtime.evaluate, DOM.getDocument, CSS.getComputedStyleForNode, Profiler.start/stop, Performance.getMetrics, Log.enable, and Network.enable.
- Do not use browser_cdp with CDP Input.* methods. They are denied because they are focus-sensitive in Electron webviews and can route input to Cursor UI instead of the browser page.
- Use browser_click, browser_type, browser_fill, browser_select_option, browser_press_key, browser_scroll, and browser_drag for clicks, typing, filling inputs, selecting options, keyboard actions, scrolling, and drag-and-drop.
- Use Runtime.evaluate for advanced DOM-scoped interactions that the dedicated browser tools do not cover.
- For profiling, call Profiler.enable, Profiler.start, reproduce the behavior, then Profiler.stop. The profile is saved to a file and returned as a log_file; read that file only when you need to inspect details.
- For JavaScript evaluation, prefer Runtime.evaluate with returnByValue when possible.
- Some browser-wide or sensitive CDP methods are denied, especially cookie, storage, permission, download, target-management, filesystem-backed file-input commands, system-level commands, and CDP navigation/history navigation commands.
- Large CDP responses are saved to files instead of being inlined. Prefer using the returned file path over immediately stuffing large payloads into context; read focused sections only when needed.

VISION:
- browser_take_screenshot attaches an image result that the model can inspect. CDP Page.captureScreenshot returns data inside JSON and should not replace browser_take_screenshot when visual verification is needed.

NOTES:
- browser_snapshot returns snapshot YAML and is the main source of truth for page structure.
- Refs are opaque handles tied to the latest browser_snapshot for that tab.
- Iframe content is not accessible - only elements outside iframes can be interacted with.
- When you stop to report a blocker, include the current page, the target you were trying to reach, the blocker you observed, and the best next action. If the blocker requires manual user interaction, ask the user to take over at that point rather than assuming it in advance." />
</mcp_meta_tool_servers>

## MCP Resource Access

You also have access to MCP resources via `FetchMcpResource`.
If a relevant server is marked as needing authentication, or if an MCP tool call fails with an authentication/authorization error, call `mcp_auth` for that server, then inspect that server again and retry the original request if appropriate. Do not call `mcp_auth` just because it is listed, and do not repeatedly call it if authentication did not fix the failure. Do not call `mcp_auth` in parallel; authenticate only one server at a time.
</mcp_meta_tools>

input.description: Reset AD passwords for two users

input.contents:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import subprocess, sys, secrets, string, os
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

alphabet = string.ascii_letters + string.digits + "!@#$%^&*"
def gen_pw():
    while True:
        p = "".join(secrets.choice(alphabet) for _ in range(14))
        if (any(c.islower() for c in p) and any(c.isupper() for c in p)
            and any(c.isdigit() for c in p) and any(c in "!@#$%^&*" for c in p)):
            return p

pw_k = gen_pw()
pw_l = gen_pw()
pw_file = r"C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\_ad_pw_tmp.txt"
with open(pw_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write(f"knaub.d|{pw_k}\nlopin.vg|{pw_l}\n")

ps = r'''
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'
$lines = Get-Content -Encoding UTF8 "C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\_ad_pw_tmp.txt"
Write-Output ("whoami=" + (whoami))
Write-Output "GROUPS:"
whoami /groups | Select-String -Pattern "Admin|Operator|Account|Domain Admins|Enterprise"
Write-Output "NET_ACCOUNTS:"
net accounts /domain

foreach ($line in $lines) {
  if (-not $line.Trim()) { continue }
  $parts = $line.Split([char]124)
  $sam = $parts[0]
  $plain = $parts[1]
  Write-Output ("--- RESET " + $sam + " ---")
  try {
    $user = [ADSI]("WinNT://PORTKKM/" + $sam + ",user")
    $user.SetPassword($plain)
    $user.SetInfo()
    $searcher = New-Object System.DirectoryServices.DirectorySearcher
    $searcher.Filter = ("(sAMAccountName=" + $sam + ")")
    $r = $searcher.FindOne()
    if ($r) {
      $de = $r.GetDirectoryEntry()
      $de.InvokeSet("pwdLastSet", -1)
      if ($null -ne $de.Properties["lockoutTime"].Value -and $de.Properties["lockoutTime"].Value -ne 0) {
        $de.Properties["lockoutTime"].Value = 0
      }
      $de.CommitChanges()
      Write-Output ("OK_SET " + $sam)
    } else {
      Write-Output ("OK_SET_WINNT " + $sam)
    }
  } catch {
    Write-Output ("FAIL " + $sam + " : " + $_.Exception.Message)
    if ($_.Exception.InnerException) {
      Write-Output ("INNER: " + $_.Exception.InnerException.Message)
    }
  }
}
'''
path = r"C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\_ad_reset.ps1"
# Write as UTF-8 with BOM for PowerShell 5
with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8-sig") as f:
    f.write(ps)

r = subprocess.run(
    ["powershell", "-NoProfile", "-ExecutionPolicy", "Bypass", "-File", path],
    capture_output=True, text=True, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace"
)
print(r.stdout)
print(r.stderr)
print("exit", r.returncode)
if "OK_SET" in (r.stdout or ""):
    print("--- PASSWORDS ---")
    print(open(pw_file, encoding="utf-8").read())

# READ-ONLY prod health snapshot
set +e
echo "=== HOST ==="
hostname; date; uptime
echo
echo "=== DISK ==="

echo
echo "=== MEM/LOAD ==="
free -h | head -3
echo
echo "=== CENTRIFUGO ==="
systemctl is-active centrifugo 2>/dev/null || systemctl is-active centrifugo.service 2>/dev/null
ss -tlnp | grep -E ':8000|:6379' || true
journalctl -u centrifugo --no-pager -n 15 2>/dev/null | tail -20
echo "--- php centrifugo errors (recent) ---"
grep -h "no sign found\|Centrifugo\|centrifugo" /var/log/php*/error.log /var/log/httpd/error_log /var/www/html/bitrix/modules/main/classes/general/log* 2>/dev/null | tail -5
journalctl --no-pager -n 200 2>/dev/null | grep -i "no sign found" | tail -5
echo
echo "=== REDIS ==="
redis-cli ping 2>&1 | head -2
echo
echo "=== SLOW QUERY sample ==="
ls -la /var/lib/mysql/*slow* 2>/dev/null | head -5
# last slow queries if file readable
if [ -f /var/lib/mysql/mysql-slow.log ]; then
  tail -c 8000 /var/lib/mysql/mysql-slow.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/# Time:/\n# Time:/g' | tail -8
elif [ -f /var/log/mysql/slow.log ]; then
  tail -c 8000 /var/log/mysql/slow.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/# Time:/\n# Time:/g' | tail -8
else
  find /var/lib/mysql /var/log -name '*slow*' 2>/dev/null | head -10
fi
echo
echo "=== CLIENT CACHE_TYPE ==="
grep -n "CACHE_TYPE" /var/www/html/client/index.php 2>/dev/null | head -5
echo
echo "=== DASHBOARD sleep/delay ==="
grep -RIn "sleep\|usleep\|setTimeout.*1000\|show_dashboard" /var/www/html/bitrix/templates/vsevset_template/components/*/news/dashboard/ 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo
echo "=== LOCAL TIMINGS (no auth) ==="
curl -sko /dev/null -w 'home %{http_code} ttfb=%{time_starttransfer} total=%{time_total}\n' -H 'Host: crm2.portkkm.ru' https://127.0.0.1/ || \
curl -sko /dev/null -w 'home_http %{http_code} ttfb=%{time_starttransfer} total=%{time_total}\n' -H 'Host: crm2.portkkm.ru' http://127.0.0.1/
curl -sko /dev/null -w 'dashboard %{http_code} ttfb=%{time_starttransfer} total=%{time_total}\n' -H 'Host: crm2.portkkm.ru' http://127.0.0.1/dashboard/
curl -sko /dev/null -w 'client %{http_code} ttfb=%{time_starttransfer} total=%{time_total}\n' -H 'Host: crm2.portkkm.ru' http://127.0.0.1/client/
echo DONE

content.text: Проверяю кэш: Bitrix ждёт Redis, а слушает memcached.

input.description: Check Redis vs memcached on prod

content.text:
Сводка по **проду** (`192.168.2.16` / `crm2.portkkm.ru`), только по фактам с машины и прошлых замеров. Прод не менялся.

### Главное
Самые болезненные места: **мертвый Redis-кэш**, **тяжёлые SQL + все вкладки карточки клиента сразу**, **сломана подпись Centrifugo**, **сводка с искусственной задержкой 1 с**.

---

### Быстродействие

| Проблема | Суть | Симптом |
|---|---|---|
| **Кэш Bitrix «в никуда»** | В `.settings.php` стоит `CacheEngineRedis`, но **Redis не слушает :6379**, **нет php-redis**. Живёт только memcached (:11211, 64 МБ) с **0 get/set** — Bitrix им не пользуется | Повторные открытия страниц почти не ускоряются managed-кэшем |
| **Карточка клиента** | В `client/index.php` — `"CACHE_TYPE" => "N"`. Вкладки рендерятся **все сразу** (lazy нет). В php-fpm slow — `GetList` по вкладкам (quest и др.) | Первое открытие карточки **~6–14 с** (раньше мерили ~13–14 с на проде) |
| **Тяжёлые SQL** | Slow log: `COUNT(DISTINCT BE.ID)` по инфоблокам, **~500k rows examined**, **2.5–3.6 с**; плюс ожидания `GET_LOCK` ~3.6 с | Пики нагрузки на MariaDB при списках/правах |
| **Сводка `/dashboard/`** | Тяжёлые виджеты + в коде **`setTimeout(..., 1000)`** перед `show_dashboard(1)` | Холодный старт **~13 с** (на клоне то же); плюс лишняя секунда UI |
| **Облако / картинки** | Slow: `clouds` OpenStack `FileExists` при `ResizeImageGet` в фильтрах/юзерах | Задержки на страницах с аватарками/картинками |
| **Переключение вкладок** | Полный перезапрос страницы (`?tab=`), без AJAX | Каждая вкладка **~0.7–2+ с** |

Остальные разделы (задачи, сделки, клиенты-список) обычно **0.3–2 с** — терпимо. **Swap = 0**, load ~1 — запас по RAM есть, узкое место не «железо в ноль».

---

### Другие баги / инфраструктура

| | |
|---|---|
| **Centrifugo** | Сервис **active**, `:8000` слушает. За последний час **~280 ошибок `no sign found in API request`** — publish с PHP не подписывается. Realtime (задачи/лента/пуши в UI) деградирован → «надо обновлять страницу» |
| **Диск** | 40 ГБ, **~9.8 ГБ свободно (76%)** — тесно для дампов/роста логов |
| **Memcached** | Запущен, но **не используется** приложением |
| **UI/данные в общем коде** | Наследие шаблона: возможные глюки реквизитов/касс (null dogovor), пересечения layout/(new)/меню — чинили на клоне; **на прод не выкатывали** |

---

### Чего на проде нет (это было только на клоне)
Вложенный UI на «Задачах», лишняя `)` на «Сделках», AJAX-вкладки, lazy-tabs, починка jquery-ui для сводки — артефакты/фиксы **клона**, не текущее состояние прода.

---

### Приоритет, если чинить прод позже
1. Починить кэш: либо поднять Redis + php-redis, либо вернуть settings на memcached/files.  
2. Lazy-tabs + `CACHE_TYPE=A` на карточке клиента.  
3. Ключи/подпись Centrifugo (или отключить шум).  
4. Убрать 1 с delay на сводке + облегчить виджеты.  
5. Разбор slow SQL (`ELEMENT_CNT` / индексы по CLIENT).

Уже есть рабочий путь на клоне. Выкат после регрессии вкладок.", }, { phase: "3. Сводка + SQL", items: "Ленивые виджеты; убрать лишние COUNT; EXPLAIN + индексы в окно.", }, { phase: "4. CRM Prod — быстродействие и баги

{META.host} · {META.when} {META.note} Прод тормозит не из‑за «слабого железа» (load ~1, RAM свободно), а из‑за мёртвого Redis-кэша, полного рендера всех вкладок карточки клиента и тяжёлых SQL. Centrifugo жив, но publish без подписи — realtime фактически сломан. Распределение по тяжести

Тайминги разделов (cold, с)

Источник: server-side curl после логина на клоне (код = прод-бэкап) · 22.07.2026 r.label)} series={[{ name: "TTFB/total cold (с)", data: SITE_TIMINGS.map((r) => r.value) }]} height={220} />

Находки и варианты решения

У каждой проблемы три варианта (A/B/C). Рекомендация — внизу карточки. {FINDINGS.map((f, idx) => ( {SEV_LABEL[f.severity]} {f.area} } > {idx + 1}. {f.title}

Дорожная карта (без риска для прода)

[r.phase, r.items])} /> Любые правки PHP/SQL/кэша — сначала клон 192.168.2.203, регрессия вкладок/сводки/логина, затем прод в короткое окно. Не включать soft-nav / полный HTML page-cache: на клоне это уже ломало Bitrix.

Что на проде сейчас нет

Вложенный UI на «Задачах», лишняя «)» на «Сделках», AJAX-вкладки, lazy-tabs, фикс jquery-ui для сводки — это артефакты/фиксы только клона. На прод не выкатывались.

content.text:
Подробная сводка со стилизацией — в Canvas рядом с чатом: [crm-prod-perf-bugs](C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\canvases\crm-prod-perf-bugs.canvas.tsx).

Внутри:
- **7 находок** с тяжестью, симптомом, причиной, evidence
- у каждой **3 варианта решения** (трудозатраты / риск / эффект) + рекомендация
- график cold-таймингов разделов
- дорожная карта выката без риска для прода
- инфра-снимок (Redis мёртв, Centrifugo ~280 ошибок/ч, диск 76%)

Кратко по приоритету: **кэш → lazy-tabs карточки → сводка/SQL → Centrifugo → диск/clouds**.
